title: paranephelium hystrix
intro: Paranephelium hystrix, also known as the spiny stinkwood or stinkwood, is a plant species that belongs to the family Rutaceae and is native to Southeast Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Paranephelium hystrix include its ability to treat digestive issues, skin problems, and respiratory infections, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve wound healing. The plant can be prepared as an herbal remedy through various methods, including infusion, decoction, and tincture, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
